steps.title: Identify the source signal
steps.content: The word as introduces why Siemowit's existence is debated: our knowledge comes from dubious oral traditions written centuries later. The blank must express how our knowledge relates to these unreliable sources.

steps.title: Connect the source relationship
steps.content:
Derived from directly expresses that our knowledge originates in these dubious traditions, explaining the debate about his existence.

The other choices either suggest our knowledge doesn't come from these sources or fail to establish the origin.

That matches choice C — C is correct.
